title: Graphic Designer + Video Ads / Content Creator
brief: Graphic Designer & Video Content Creator Full-Time | Remote | $9–12 USD/hr NON NEGOTIABLE Monday–Friday | 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM EST Scale My Meal Prep is one of North America's fastest-growing agencies serving restaurant owners, caterers, and meal prep companies. We currently support over 1,500 businesses across North America and are looking for a talented Graphic Designer & Video Content Creator to join our growing creative team. This is a long-term position with opportunities for increased hours, bonuses, and advancement for the right candidate. What You'll Be Doing: Graphic Design * Facebook & Instagram Ads * Email Marketing Graphics * Shopify Store Graphics * Website Banners & Assets * Landing Page Graphics * Branding Assets * Promotional Creatives Video Editing & Creative Production * Short Form Video Ads * Reels & TikTok Content * UGC Style Ad Creation * Motion Graphics * Product Showcase Videos * Social Media Video Content * Video Resizing & Adaptation What We're Looking For: Non-Negotiables * Available Monday–Friday, 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM EST * Strong English communication skills * Reliable internet connection * Ability to follow delegation instructions accurately * Ability to work quickly with minimal revisions * Comfortable receiving feedback and implementing revisions Preferred Skills: * Photoshop * Illustrator * Premiere Pro * After Effects * Figma * CapCut * Shopify experience * Agency experience How We Measure Success You will be evaluated on: -Speed How quickly can you
